_notes: ARIA voice/chat suggestions for Twinings demo — all SAP-centric questions that will resonate with an audience that lives in S/4HANA every day.

suggestions.text: Why is the MDG approval queue at 847 items and what can ZeroOps do about it?
How much time could Twinings IT save if ZeroOps auto-approved standard authorization requests?
What happened with the Fiori cache issue overnight and how did ZeroOps resolve it without waking anyone?
Calculate the ROI for Twinings if ZeroOps reduces MTTR from 285 hours to 28 minutes
Which of the open incidents today could ZeroOps resolve autonomously right now?
What is the biggest risk to Twinings IT in the next 72 hours based on current trends?
